name: Billy and Amanda
text: We couldn't be happier with the fence Adam built for our home. He installed a beautiful 48-inch-tall horizontal farm-style perimeter fence with black pillars that perfectly complement our house. The craftsmanship and attention to detail are evident throughout the entire project, and the stain finish really brought everything together. Adam was reliable, easy to work with, communicated well throughout the project, and took pride in delivering quality work. The finished product exceeded our expectations and has completely transformed the look of our property. If you're looking for someone who does quality work, shows up when he says he will, and genuinely cares about the final result, I would recommend Adam without hesitation.

name: Janet Graves
text: I am very happy with my new gates and backyard fence. I love the beautiful horizontal boards and it was a pleasure working with Adam. He was communicative and responsive to our needs and requests. Thank you, Adam.
